title: Better adventure
description: add features like faster sleep, better Trader and more
body:
video: https://youtu.be/7DuFWe9HHB8

add:

faster sleep,

better wandering trader(3 new types of wandering trader: hunter, miner and farmer, wandering trader drops bundle),




faster minecart,



longer days and nights,



bundles have more storege(drop the bundle and the item on the same block)


as you play mobs geting stronger
